articles.title: UGC NET June 2026 application correction window opens tomorrow at ugcnet.nta.nic.in; check steps to edit your form here
articles.summary: The National Testing Agency has opened the UGC NET June 2026 application correction window from May 26 to May 28. Candidates can now edit submitted application details on the official website.

articles.title: JEE Advanced 2026 answer key released at jeeadv.ac.in: Check direct link, steps to raise objections here
articles.summary: IIT Roorkee has unveiled the provisional JEE Advanced 2026 answer key on its official website. Aspirants can now check their responses and raise objections until May 26, 2026.

articles.title: AP EAMCET 2026 answer key, response sheet releasing shortly at cets.apsche.ap.gov.in: Check steps to download, raise objections
articles.summary: The provisional AP EAMCET 2026 answer key and response sheet will be released today, May 25, at 11 am on the official APSCHE website. Candidates can raise objections to the provisional key until May 27, with a fee of Rs 300 per question, which will be refunded if the objection is valid..

articles.title: JEECUP 2026 admit card expected to be released today at jeecup.admissions.nic.in: Check steps to download hall ticket
articles.summary: The JEECUP 2026 admit card is expected to be released today on the official website for candidates seeking admission to diploma programs across Uttar Pradesh. The examination, conducted in computer-based test mode from June 2 to June 9, 2026, will assess candidates through 100 MCQs in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics..
